flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lower Columbia College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.4k → $6.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lower Columbia College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.2k → $4.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lower Columbia College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Lower Columbia College fell 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.0k → $10.5k).
